caption:
So here I am, 11 PM, grading papers in my tiny office after hours... 🌙

The silk blouse feels cool against my skin, hugging my curves just right as I sit behind this mahogany desk. I just finished my lecture for advanced Literature, and now it's my own private time, but you know what happens when curiosity strikes... 📚✨ I'm a woman who knows how to turn the heat up in any classroom, even without a syllabus. A student knocked on the door, nervous and flustered, asking for extra help. As I opened the door, the scent of old books and vanilla perfume filled the air. We ended up talking for hours about everything and nothing. He left a little later, blushing, and I watched him walk away, adjusting my black pencil skirt to make sure I looked even more irresistible. Tonight was perfect, just like every other night in my favorite job. 💋

#UniversityTeacher #LecturesAndLife #CurvyAndConfident #LateNightStudy #AcademicChic
